sentences.target: Ich arbeite seit gestern in der Abteilung.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈaʁbaɪ̯tə zaɪ̯t ˈɡɛstɐn ɪn deːɐ̯ apˈtaɪ̯lʊŋ/

translations.de: Ich arbeite seit gestern in der Abteilung.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈaʁbaɪ̯tə zaɪ̯t ˈɡɛstɐn ɪn deːɐ̯ apˈtaɪ̯lʊŋ/
translations.en: I've been working in the department since yesterday.
translations.es: Trabajo en el departamento desde ayer.
translations.fr: Je travaille au service depuis hier.
translations.zh-Hans: 我从昨天开始在部门工作。
translations.yue: 我喺昨日開始喺嗰個部門做嘢。
translations.ru: Я работаю в отделе со вчера.
translations.pt: Estou trabalhando no departamento desde ontem.
translations.vi: Tôi làm ở bộ phận từ hôm qua.
translations.nl: Ik werk sinds gisteren op de afdeling.
translations.uk: Я працюю у відділі з учора.
translations.hi: मैं कल से विभाग में काम कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg har jobbet på avdelingen siden i går.
translations.id: Saya sudah bekerja di bagian sejak kemarin.
translations.sv: Jag har jobbat på avdelningen sedan i går.
translations.da: Jeg har arbejdet på afdelingen siden i går.
translations.ja: 昨日から部署で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Temporal adverb; complement within the PP ‘seit gestern’.
Preposition; here with dative for static location.
Definite article; dative singular feminine agreeing with ‘Abteilung’.
Common noun; feminine; dative singular as object of the preposition ‘in’.

sentences.target: Du kannst mal in der Abteilung nachfragen.
sentences.reading: /duː kanst maːl ɪn deːɐ̯ apˈtaɪ̯lʊŋ ˈnaːxfʁaːɡən/

translations.de: Du kannst mal in der Abteilung nachfragen.
translations.ipa: /duː kanst maːl ɪn deːɐ̯ apˈtaɪ̯lʊŋ ˈnaːxfʁaːɡən/
translations.en: You can ask in the department.
translations.yue: 你可以去嗰個部門問吓。
translations.vi: Bạn có thể hỏi ở bộ phận.
translations.nl: Je kunt het bij de afdeling vragen.
translations.hi: तुम विभाग में पूछ सकते हो.
translations.ja: 部署で聞いてみればいいよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary; present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects infinitive.
Modal particle softening the request/command.
Preposition; here with dative for location.
Definite article; dative singular feminine agreeing with ‘Abteilung’.
Common noun; feminine; dative singular as complement of ‘in’.
Infinitive main verb selected by the modal; separable-prefix verb (not split here).

sentences.target: Die Abteilung sucht dringend eine Vertretung.

translations.de: Die Abteilung sucht dringend eine Vertretung.
translations.en: The department is urgently looking for a replacement.
translations.es: El departamento busca con urgencia un reemplazo.
translations.fr: Le service cherche d'urgence un remplaçant.
translations.it: Il reparto cerca urgentemente un sostituto.
translations.ko: 부서에서 급하게 대체 인력을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 部门正在紧急寻找替补人员。
translations.pt: O departamento está procurando com urgência um substituto.
translations.vi: Bộ phận đang gấp tìm người thay thế.
translations.ar: القسم يبحث بشكل عاجل عن بديل.
translations.nl: De afdeling zoekt dringend een vervanger.
translations.hi: विभाग तुरन्त एक स्थानापन्न की तलाश कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Dział pilnie szuka osoby na zastępstwo.
translations.ja: 部署は至急代わりの人を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; subject.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Adverb modifying the verb; manner.
Indefinite article; accusative singular feminine.
Common noun; feminine; accusative singular; direct object.

sentences.target: Er findet die Abteilung im dritten Stock.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ˈfɪndət diː apˈtaɪ̯lʊŋ ɪm ˈdʁɪtən ʃtɔk/

translations.de: Er findet die Abteilung im dritten Stock.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ˈfɪndət diː apˈtaɪ̯lʊŋ ɪm ˈdʁɪtən ʃtɔk/
translations.en: He finds the department on the third floor.
translations.es: Encuentra el departamento en el tercer piso.
translations.fr: Il trouve le service au troisième étage.
translations.it: Trova il reparto al terzo piano.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在三楼找到了那个部门。
translations.yue: 佢喺三樓搵到嗰個部門。
translations.ru: Он находит отдел на третьем этаже.
translations.pt: Ele encontra o departamento no terceiro andar.
translations.he: הוא מוצא את המחלקה בקומה השלישית.
translations.vi: Anh ấy tìm thấy bộ phận ở tầng ba.
translations.nl: Hij vindt de afdeling op de derde verdieping.
translations.uk: Він знаходить відділ на третьому поверсі.
translations.hu: Megtalálja az osztályt a harmadik emeleten.
translations.hi: वह विभाग को तीसरी मंज़िल पर पाता है.
translations.el: Βρίσκει το τμήμα στον τρίτο όροφο.
translations.nb: Han finner avdelingen i tredje etasje.
translations.id: Dia menemukan departemen itu di lantai tiga.
translations.sv: Han hittar avdelningen på tredje våningen.
translations.ro: El găsește departamentul la etajul trei.
translations.da: Han finder afdelingen på tredje sal.
translations.ja: 彼は三階で部署を見つけます。
